name: retrieval-dataset-geo
description: Runs NCBI GEO search/query/fetch through Omiga local subprocess routing.

sources.label: NCBI GEO
sources.description: Gene Expression Omnibus dataset metadata via NCBI GEO DataSets E-utilities.
riskNotes: Read-only public NCBI GEO DataSets APIs; optional NCBI credentials are projected only when configured.

parameters.name: retmax
parameters.description: Maximum GEO records to request from ESearch.

interface.shortDescription: NCBI GEO as a local retrieval plugin
interface.longDescription: Runs NCBI GEO search/query/fetch through Omiga local subprocess routing.
defaultPrompt: Search GEO for lung cancer expression datasets.
Fetch a GEO accession through the GEO plugin.
